mapper.update: UPDATE sb_trade_info SET safe_payment_st = 'NONE', safe_payment_expire_dtm = NULL, pending_buyer_seq = NULL, upd_dtm = now() WHERE safe_payment_st = 'PENDING' AND safe_payment_expire_dtm IS NOT NULL AND safe_payment_expire_dtm < now()

UPDATE sb_trade_info SET confirm_purchase = true, settlement_st = CASE WHEN safe_payment_st = 'COMPLETED' THEN 'READY' ELSE settlement_st END WHERE confirm_purchase = false AND sale_st = 'SOLD' AND sale_st_dtm < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY)
